texto: Focus is a weapon as much as much as your bow.
explicacao: Citação de Erin Summerill sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Focus is a weapon as much as much as your bow.” articula reflexao, focus, weapon em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: The ocean is a rolling field of the bluest crop I've ever seen, filling our view two days after escaping the guards. The sea touches the horizon, swaying and moving like a living, breathing being beneath a lid of white clouds and sunshine. It's possibly the most beautiful thing in the world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Erin Summerill: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The ocean is a rolling field of the bluest crop I've ever seen, filling our view two days after e…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, ocean, rolling pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: The ocean is a rolling field of the bluest crop I've ever seen, filling our view two days after escaping the guards. The sea touches the horizon, swaying and moving like a living, breathing being beneath a lid of white clouds and sunshine. It's possibly the most beautiful thing in the world.
